name: groweasy-csv-importer
description: AI-powered CSV importer for GrowEasy CRM

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace=backend" "npm run start --workspace=frontend"
